product_modes.label: Overview
product_modes.purpose: Default site-sourcing workspace with map exploration, parcel search, live layers, headline intelligence, and compact countywide context.

product_modes.label: Due Diligence
product_modes.purpose: Selected-parcel workflow focused on parcel characteristics, flood constraints, development activity, permit events, and supporting intelligence.

product_modes.label: Executive Print
product_modes.purpose: Print-friendly executive site intelligence report for the active selected parcel, with a clean no-selected-parcel state.

executive_summary_changes: Overview is now the default product mode.
Overview prioritizes search, map exploration, selected parcel state, headline metrics, and next action guidance.
Detailed countywide parcel, development, and flood rollups are collapsed below the headline content.
Selected-parcel-specific panels no longer present as primary Overview clutter.
due_diligence_changes: Due Diligence hides the left layer rail to give the map and selected-parcel intelligence more room.
No-selected-parcel state clearly asks the user to select a parcel.
Selected parcel summary, development activity, permit events, flood constraints, and map context are grouped as the primary due diligence workflow.
Detailed supporting parcel/development/flood panels remain available in a collapsed section.
executive_print_changes: Executive Print hides the map, layer rail, and bottom metric bar.
Print report includes selected parcel, development, flood constraint, latest permit events, map snapshot placeholder, and executive notes.
A visible print action is available in both selected and no-selected report states.
Print CSS hides app chrome and map controls while preserving report content.
layer_registry_changes: Left rail renamed to Explore / Layers.
Map Layers remains collapsed by default to reduce visual noise.
Development Hotspots, Flood Constraints, FEMA Flood Zones, and existing supporting controls are preserved.
Planning tools and legacy composite signals are collapsed to keep the executive experience focused.
kpi_bar_changes: Bottom metric bar remains limited to compact executive KPIs.
Executive Print mode hides the bottom KPI bar.
Overview headline cards emphasize growth activity, flood review parcels, development activity, and total parcels.

smoke_test.note: Use http://localhost:3000 for local Next dev. Opening http://127.0.0.1:3000 can trigger Next dev-origin protection unless allowedDevOrigins includes 127.0.0.1.

notes: The primary user journey is clearer: search and explore, inspect selected parcel, print executive report.
Advanced diagnostics remain preserved but are no longer part of the default executive path.
Future cleanup can further tune individual card copy and selected-parcel report pagination.
